description: A buyer is notified by a supplier that a critical shipment will be delayed. They need to assess the impact.

nodes.task_description: Identify all upcoming production orders that depend on the delayed material.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of work orders that will be affected by the delay.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier to get a firm revised delivery date and explore options for expediting.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates with the supplier and gets a new ETA.

nodes.task_description: Update the expected delivery date on the purchase order and notify the production planning team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the PO and sends a notification to the planning department.
